comments.text: Mere paas xuv 700 hai sabse pehle main jab ICICI Lombard 1st time karwaya to 2 claim liya... Uske baadh jab fir se icici Lombard policy leni chahiye to 78000 k bola lagega fir same facility ke saath maine TATA aig ka insurance liya to only 46000 rs laga ... Icici Lombard wale lootne ke liye tayar rehte hain agr aapne claim le liya aur fir se dubara agr insurance usi ke lete hain to isiliye satrk rhe sabdhan rhe .... TATA aig always best
